title: [SOME] Square Optimized Modpack Enthusiasm
body:
_Hi!_ I made a pretty optimized modpack.**There is not A SINGLE mod in it that is NOT related to optimization**.If you have any questions, please contact discord!
Square Optimized Modpack Enthusiasm allows you to boost your FPS in minecraft!It's a pretty good modpack that's willing to do a lot to please you .It will help you a lot because there are a lot of optimizing mods!
